ground_truth.title: MBA Programs - NYU Stern
ground_truth.main_content: NYU Stern offers a range of MBA programs tailored to meet your specific academic and professional goals. Your Passion. Your Purpose. Your MBA. The MBA Programs available include: Full-time MBA - General MBA, Full-time, 2 years, 60 credits. Andre Koo Technology and Entrepreneurship MBA - Focused MBA, Full-time, 1 year, 52 credits. Luxury & Retail MBA - Focused MBA, Full-time, 1 year, 52 credits. Part-time MBA - General MBA, Part-time, 2-6 years to complete, 60 credits, Fall and Spring intakes. Dual Degrees including MD/MBA, JD/MBA, MBA/MFA, MBA/MPA and more. Stern at NYUAD MBA - Full-time, general MBA, 1 year, Abu Dhabi-based, Summer term in NYC, 54 credits. MS Path to MBA includes Online Master's in Management - Part-time, Online, 20 months, highly structured, one course at a time, Core business knowledge, Potential to transfer to the Part-time MBA.
